description_long: This is a single athletic sneaker with a dark upper, likely made from synthetic mesh and fabric, featuring a lace-up closure system. The shoe has a thick, light-colored rubber sole with a wavy tread pattern, designed for comfort and grip on urban surfaces. The upper appears to be reinforced at the toe and heel, providing durability and support. The interior is padded, suggesting cushioning for the wearer, and the collar is low-cut for ankle mobility. There is a faint brand marking on the heel, but it is not clearly legible. The shoe shows signs of use, with some dirt and scuffing visible on the sole and upper.
description: A dark athletic sneaker with a thick, light-colored sole and lace-up closure, showing signs of wear and urban use. The shoe features a padded interior and reinforced toe and heel areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, laces, and reinforced toe cap.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the shoe's profile, wavy sole, and low-cut collar.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel reinforcement and faint brand marking.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the shoe's overall shape and sole pattern.
